---
title: "SSC for a One-Arm Fixed Design with Time-to-Event endpoints"
# bibliography: references.bibtex
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
source("../quarto-setup.R")
```

```{r}
x <- read_rds("../outputs/comp_surv_gs.rds")
```

```{r}
datatable(x$n_ratio)
```

```{r}
x$tables$table_n_ratio
```

```{r}
x$plots$p_n_ratio
```
